In the competitive Iranian market, businesses need reliable, comprehensive, and easy-to-use software to manage their financial and operational challenges. Raha’an (rahaan.ir) has emerged as one of the most trusted providers of accounting and ERP solutions in Iran.
The Story of Raha’an
Founded in 1388 (2009), Raha’an started with a clear mission: to develop high-quality financial and management software for manufacturing, trading, and service companies. With over 15 years of experience, a team of experts in accounting, management, and programming, and a deep understanding of Iranian business needs, Raha’an has grown into one of the most popular ERP and accounting software providers in the country.
Today, more than 500 active companies and over 3000 daily users trust Raha’an for their daily operations.
Why Businesses Choose Raha’an
Raha’an stands out because of its practical approach to solving real business problems:

• Fully Integrated System: All modules — from accounting and treasury to inventory, sales, purchasing, payroll, and production — work together seamlessly in one platform.

• • Real-time Reports: Get accurate financial and managerial reports instantly without complicated processes.

• • High Security: Your business data is protected with up-to-date security standards.

• • User-Friendly Design: Easy interface that requires minimal training.

• • Scalability: Grows with your business — suitable for small shops, growing companies, and large enterprises.

• • Excellent Support: Professional team ready to help during implementation and ongoing use.

• Key Modules and Features

• Raha’an offers a complete suite of business tools:

• • Financial Accounting — Full ledger, documents, balance sheet

• • Treasury & Cash Management — Checks, cash flow, petty cash

• • Sales & CRM — Customer management and invoicing

• • Purchasing & Suppliers

• • Inventory & Warehouse Management

• • Payroll & HR

• • Fixed Assets

• • Manufacturing & Costing (Eco System)

• • Maintenance & Repairs

• Whether you run a retail store, a manufacturing plant, or a large holding company, Raha’an has tailored solutions for you.

• Modern Technology Stack

• • Desktop ERP: Built with WPF / C# and SQL Server for powerful performance

• • Web Application: Modern platform using Next.js and React — access your data from anywhere

• • Mobile-Friendly Access

• Impressive Results

• • 98% Customer Satisfaction

• • Hundreds of successful implementations across different industries

• • Continuous updates based on customer feedback and new business requirements

• More Than Just Accounting Software

• Raha’an is not limited to financial software. The company also offers:

• • A professional website builder

• • Raha’an Shop (specialized gaming and computer equipment store)

• • Custom development and consulting services

• Ready to Transform Your Business?

• If you are looking for a reliable Iranian ERP and accounting software that understands local business regulations, tax requirements, and real operational challenges, Raha’an is an excellent choice.

• Visit the official website: https://rahaan.ir

• Request a free demo today and see how Raha’an can simplify your financial and administrative processes while giving you better control over your business.
